inputs.substress_jul_source: Median of 2010-2024 training SubStress_Jul (14 years). Real 2026 peak-July value not yet observed — forecast firms up late July.

forecast.calibration_note: When peak-July 2026 CASMA data lands, apply casma.casma_to_nass_substress() before plugging in here.

history.note: Excluded: Southern Rust disease pressure (Benton imputed via 8-county YoY ratio = 225.0)
